cohort_id: # - Fill in one row per cohort below the EXAMPLE rows. The EXAMPLE and # rows are ignored on import.
# - cohort_id: unique number for each cohort (1 2 3 ...)
# - name: short display name shown in the tool
# - description: free-text explanation of this cohort
# - target_rows: the expected/agreed record count (leave blank if unknown)
# - notes: any sign-off or dependency notes
# - FILTER COLUMNS (STATE / ADDRESS_TYPE / IS_PRIMARY and any others you add):
#   Leave blank or write * to apply no filter on that column.
#   Single value  →  exact match  e.g.  VIC
# - Comma-separated values → IN filter e.g. VIC
name: NSW (quote the cell in Excel if value contains a comma)

cohort_id: # - You can ADD extra filter columns by inserting new column headers to the right.
# - Save as CSV and use Import Plan (CSV) in the Cohort Plan tab.

name: Cohort 1: Victoria — All Addresses
description: All billing and service addresses in Victoria. First batch to validate the end-to-end process.

name: Cohort 2: NSW — Billing Only
description: Billing-type addresses in New South Wales.

name: Cohort 3: QLD and SA — Billing
description: Billing addresses across Queensland and South Australia combined.

name: Cohort 4: All Remaining — Primary Records
description: Primary-flagged records in states not covered by cohorts 1–3.

name: Cohort 5: Service Addresses — All States
description: All service-type addresses. Requires Kraken service-address activation flag before loading.
